svg.text: Corrected Fusion Math: Including Bias Terms
You're right - bias adds DRAM pressure even when zero (must still load/check)
1. Where Bias Terms Appear in Transformer
Bias is loaded ONCE per GEMM, added to each output row
No bias in attention scores! (QK^T has no bias)
3. Bias Fusion Strategy: Where to Add, When to Load

g.text: Option A: Load bias ONCE, fuse into GEMM accumulator
✓ BEST: Bias fused into accumulator init
Option B: Separate bias add after GEMM (wasteful!)
